goal: Map PrintString/GetStringLength callsites, callers, flags, text sources, and visible side-effect categories.
scope: PrintString plus immediate ui text rendering support rows
exit_condition: Caller/state map published with source-backed callsite rows only.

goal: Classify PrintString coordinate, colour, string source, and flag argument shapes into stable metadata categories.
exit_condition: Taxonomy distinguishes source-backed shapes from unproven runtime payload assumptions.

goal: Document text/font/global state dependencies and blockers for safe reconstruction or marker decisions.
scope: font buffers, string tables, flags, draw queues
exit_condition: State-contract matrix either unblocks a comparison gate or records exact remaining blockers.

goal: Compare source-level semantics against non-raw binary metadata without versioning instruction text or addresses.
exit_condition: Readiness matrix names any code-change-ready or marker-ready rows, otherwise remains blocked.

goal: Apply a minimal source or marker patch only if RE-167 marks rows ready.
exit_condition: Patch/build/tests pass, or a no-patch blocker is published.

goal: Select the next SPEC_PSXPC_N cluster after ui text rendering closes or blocks.
exit_condition: Next cluster/handoff artifact names the smallest useful proof gate.

goal: Close the module SPEC_PSXPC_N domain when clusters are proved or terminally blocked, then hand off to the next domain.
exit_condition: Closure or exhausted handoff is emitted with next objective.
